Connection.description: Smarter API - generic SQL Connection class.

dbEngine.description: A valid SQL database engine. Common db_engines: ['django.db.backends.postgresql', 'django.db.backends.mysql', 'django.db.backends.oracle', 'django.db.backends.sqlite3', 'django.db.backends.mssql', 'django.db.backends.sybase']
dbEngine.title: Dbengine

hostname.description: The remote host of the SQL connection. Should be a valid internet domain name. Example: 'localhost' or 'mysql.mycompany.com'.
hostname.title: Hostname

port.description: The port of the SQL connection. Default values are assigned based on the dbEngine.
port.title: Port

database.description: The name of the database to connect to. Examples: 'sales' or 'mydb'.
database.title: Database

timeout.description: The timeout for the database connection in seconds. Default is 30 seconds.
timeout.title: Timeout

useSsl.description: Whether to use SSL/TLS for the connection.
useSsl.title: Usessl

sslCert.description: The SSL certificate for the connection, if required.
sslCert.title: Sslcert

sslKey.description: The SSL key for the connection, if required.
sslKey.title: Sslkey

sslCa.description: The Certificate Authority (CA) certificate for verifying the server.
sslCa.title: Sslca

proxyHost.description: The remote host of the SQL proxy connection. Should be a valid internet domain name.
proxyHost.title: Proxyhost

proxyPort.description: The port of the SQL proxy connection.
proxyPort.title: Proxyport

proxyUsername.description: The username for the proxy connection.
proxyUsername.title: Proxyusername

proxyPassword.description: The password for the proxy connection.
proxyPassword.title: Proxypassword

sshKnownHosts.description: The known_hosts file content for verifying SSH connections.
sshKnownHosts.title: Sshknownhosts

poolSize.description: The size of the connection pool.
poolSize.title: Poolsize

maxOverflow.description: The maximum number of connections to allow beyond the pool size.
maxOverflow.title: Maxoverflow

authenticationMethod.description: The authentication method to use for the connection. Example: 'Standard TCP/IP', 'Standard TCP/IP over SSH', 'LDAP User/Password'.
authenticationMethod.title: Authenticationmethod

Connection.title: Connection

SAMConnectionCommonMetadata.description: Smarter API Connection Manifest - common Metadata class.

name.description: The camelCase name of the manifest resource
name.title: Name

description.description: The description for this resource. Be brief. Keep it under 255 characters.
description.title: Description

version.description: The semantic version of the manifest. Example: 0.1.0
version.title: Version

tags.description: The tags of the manifest. Used for generic resource categorization and search. Example: ['tag1', 'tag2']
tags.title: Tags

annotations.description: The manifest annotations. Used for storing arbitrary metadata as key-value pairs. Example: [{'smarter.sh/test-manifest/project-name': 'Scooby dooby do'}]. The key should be a valid url-friendly string. The value accepts multi-line string values (YAML block scalars) and various scalar types including str, int, float, bool, datetime.date, datetime.datetime, decimal.Decimal, uuid.UUID, bytes, list, dict.
annotations.title: Annotations

SAMConnectionCommonMetadata.title: SAMConnectionCommonMetadata

SAMConnectionCommonStatus.description: Smarter API Connection Manifest - Status class.

account_number.description: Connection.status.account_number: The account owner of this Connection. Read only.
account_number.title: Account Number

username.description: Connection.status.account_number: The Smarter user who created this Connection. Read only.
username.title: Username

created.description: Connection.status.created: The date in which this Connection was created. Read only.
created.title: Created

modified.description: Connection.status.modified: The date in which this Connection was most recently changed. Read only.
modified.title: Modified

SAMConnectionCommonStatus.title: SAMConnectionCommonStatus

SAMSqlConnectionSpec.description: Smarter API Sql Connection Manifest Connection.spec

connection.description: SqlConnection.spec.selector[obj]: the selector logic to use for the SqlConnection

SAMSqlConnectionSpec.title: SAMSqlConnectionSpec

data.description: Smarter API Manifest - SqlPlugin Connection Model

apiVersion.description: apiVersion[String]: Required. The API version of the AbstractSAMBase.
apiVersion.title: Apiversion

kind.description: kind[String]: Required. The kind of resource described by the manifest.
kind.title: Kind

status.description: SqlConnection.status[obj]: Optional, Read-only. Stateful status information about the SqlConnection.

data.title: SAMSqlConnection
